# revenuecat_package (Resource)

A package within a RevenueCat offering.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "revenuecat_package" "monthly" {
  project_id   = var.revenuecat_project_id
  offering_id  = revenuecat_offering.default.id
  lookup_key   = "$rc_monthly"
  display_name = "Monthly"
  position     = 1
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `display_name` (String) Human-readable package name.
- `lookup_key` (String) Stable package lookup key.
- `offering_id` (String) Parent offering ID.
- `project_id` (String) RevenueCat project ID.

### Optional

- `position` (Number) Package position within the offering.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (Number) Creation time in milliseconds since Unix epoch.
- `id` (String) RevenueCat package ID.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import revenuecat_package.monthly proj_example/ofrng_example/pkge_example
```
